title: Pavada Purusha

title: Pavada Purusha
desc: Balu gets furious as Chandulal's family refuses to return the plate in which he eats food. Soon, a fire breaks out at Chandulal's fields and Chandulal's car breaks down during his travel. Is. S01 E92.
